user_query: I'm interested in the performance data of major global indices. Can you fetch the performance data of major global indices, including the daily, one-week, one-month, year-to-date, one-year, and three-year performance? Additionally, I would like to read the latest financial news articles.

TaskList.description: Fetch the daily performance data of major global indices.
Fetch the one-week performance data of major global indices.
Fetch the one-month performance data of major global indices.
Fetch the year-to-date performance data of major global indices.
Fetch the one-year performance data of major global indices.
Fetch the three-year performance data of major global indices.
Fetch the latest financial news articles.
